economic_notes: KRW Limited Partnership investment held with Keeseekoowenin and Waywayseecappo First Nations for real property development on Brandon Lands; no development activity during year. Heritage Co-Op patronage equity held. Business enterprises include Southquill Gaming Centre, Southquill Restaurant, and Southquill Gas Bar.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (year ended March 31, 2022). Auditor is Lazer Grant LLP (Chartered Professional Accountants, Winnipeg MB). Seven entities consolidated including Band Operations, Housing, Post-Secondary, Social Assistance, Southquill Health Services, Southquill Gaming Centre & Restaurant, and Southquill Gas Bar. Deferred revenue includes $1,109,000 for ISC new houses deferred to subsequent year. Two housing construction projects in progress totalling $707,620. Capital lease obligations of $120,697 outstanding. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Total expenses in segment disclosure ($16,175,621) differ from operating expenses on income statement ($14,988,332) because segment totals include amortization; the income statement separates amortization as other expenses. osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding minus CMHC minus First Peoples Development Inc. minus Province of Manitoba transfers.
